# priority

**Type Property**

An attribute that indicates a priority notification.

## Declaration

```swift
static let priority: AccessoryNotification.Attributes
```

## Identifying attribute types

- **critical**: An attribute that indicates a critical notification.
- **timeSensitive**: An attribute that indicates a time-sensitive notification.

items.description: An attribute that indicates a critical notification.
items.name: critical

items.description: An attribute that indicates a time-sensitive notification.
